ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: No periodic notes settings are enabled. You must turn on one of daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly or yearly notes within the Periodic Notes plugin settings to be able to configure them to generate automatically.
ast.target: 未启用任何周期性笔记设置。您必须在“周期性笔记”插件设置中开启每日、每周、每月、每季度或每年笔记中的一项，才能配置它们自动生成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When opening Obsidian or checking notes, always open your periodic notes even when they haven't just been created. This can be useful for maintaining a consistent workspace with pinned notes each time you start your day.
ast.target: 打开 Obsidian 或检查笔记时，即使笔记刚刚创建，也始终打开您的周期性笔记。这对于在每次开始一天时维护一个包含固定笔记的一致工作区非常有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, automatically process and remove Templater syntax (like <% tp.file.cursor(0) %>) from notes created in the background. Note: With the current implementation of Templater processing APIs, this leads to a brief creation and then closure of tabs in the UI.
ast.target: 启用后，自动处理并移除后台创建的笔记中的 Templater 语法（如 <% tp.file.cursor(0) %>）。注意：根据当前 Templater 处理 API 的实现，这会导致 UI 中的标签页短暂创建然后关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, automatically commit any changes within the vault.
ast.target: 启用后，自动提交保险库内的任何更改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the message to use when committing, where {DATE} will be replaced with the current date.
ast.target: 设置提交时使用的消息，其中 {DATE} 将被替换为当前日期。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only create new daily notes Monday - Friday, excluding Saturdays and Sundays.
ast.target: 仅在周一至周五创建新的每日笔记，不包括周六和周日。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the new note when created.
ast.target: 创建新笔记时自动打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically pin the new note to your tabs.
ast.target: 自动将新笔记固定到您的标签页。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: No periodic notes enabled
ast.target: 未启用周期性笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Always open periodic notes
ast.target: 始终打开周期性笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Process Templater code in automatically created notes
ast.target: 处理自动创建的笔记中的 Templater 代码

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable automatic git commit at the end of each day (18:00/6pm)
ast.target: 在每天结束时（18:00/下午6点）启用自动 git 提交

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Git commit message format
ast.target: Git 提交消息格式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude weekends
ast.target: 排除周末

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个未挂载的组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载一个状态代理，而不是组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在第一次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.target: 水合失败：

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The Periodic Notes plugin must be installed and available for Auto Periodic Notes to work.
ast.target: 必须安装并可用“周期性笔记”插件，“自动周期性笔记”才能工作。

ast.name: text
ast.source: All periodic notes
ast.target: 所有周期性笔记
